/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fexceptions   -fopenmp  -O3 -DNDEBUG   -shared -Wl,-soname,libfast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libfast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/fast_lio/msg/detail/pose6_d__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jetson/slash_ws/build/fast_lio:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libfast_lio__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
